issues.title: Test failure in Coherence Vector Store
issues.body:
We have had issues running CoherenceVectorStoreIT in CI, and now when upgrading to 25.03, we saw a test failure.  Going back to 24.09 also produced a test failure, so it isn't due to a version change.

Needs investigation.

comments.body:
```
java.lang.AssertionError: 
Expecting actual:
  {"distance"=0.6656918525695801}
to contain key:
  "meta1"

	at org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.coherence.CoherenceVectorStoreIT.lambda$searchWithThreshold$4(CoherenceVectorStoreIT.java:287)
```

When running the `CoherenceVectorStoreIT` on a macbook pro, I consistently see the following and the tests eventually fail.
